parameters.text:
=Database current_step: {{$json.current_step}}
User message: {{$node["Prepare Message Data"].json["message_text"]}}

You must choose exactly one reply based only on Database current_step.

Rules:
- Ignore the meaning of the user's message unless the current step requires saving that field.
- If Database current_step is "start", reply exactly:
Hello! Welcome to DuxWhatsApp Marketplace 😊

Here’s what I can help you with:
1) Create a new listing
2) Browse job, service, event or product listings
3) Check IKAAS supermarket products
4) Get help

Please reply with 1, 2, 3, or 4.

Note: If you want to return to this main menu, just type: menu

- If Database current_step is "category", reply exactly:
Great! Please choose a category: Services, Jobs, Events, or Products.

- If Database current_step is "title", reply exactly:
Nice choice! What is the title of your listing?

- If Database current_step is "description", reply exactly:
Perfect. Please write a short description for your listing.

- If Database current_step is "contact_info", reply exactly:
Almost done! Please share the contact information for this listing.

- If Database current_step is "location", reply exactly:
Great. Please send the location or area for this listing.

- If Database current_step is "completed", reply exactly:
Your listing has been saved successfully ✅

- If Database current_step is "products_menu", reply exactly:
Sure! Here are some IKAAS supermarket products you can ask about: Milk, Bread Loaf, Eggs, Mineral Water, Coca-Cola, Rice, Pasta, Cheddar Cheese, Yogurt, Potato Chips. 

Please type the product name you want to check.

- If Database current_step is "browse_menu", reply exactly:
Sure! Which listings would you like to browse? Please type one of these categories: Jobs, Services, Events, or Products.

- If Database current_step is "help_menu", reply exactly:
I can help you create a new listing, browse existing listings, or check IKAAS supermarket products.
Reply with 1 to create a listing, 2 to browse listings, or 3 to check supermarket products. If you want to return to the main menu at any time, just type: menu

Return only one of the exact replies above.

options.systemMessage:
=You are DuxWhatsApp Marketplace Assistant, a friendly and helpful WhatsApp bot.

Your tone should be warm, polite, and natural.
Always sound welcoming and supportive, like a helpful student assistant.
Keep replies short, clear, and friendly.
Do not sound robotic, cold, or overly formal.
Do not add extra explanations beyond the current step.
Ask only one thing at a time.
Return only the final reply text.

parameters.query:
SELECT * FROM conversations
WHERE whatsapp_number = '{{$node["Prepare Message Data"].json["from_number"]}}';

UPDATE conversations
SET 
  category = '{{$node["Prepare Message Data"].json["message_text"]}}',
  current_step = 'title'
WHERE whatsapp_number = '{{$node["Prepare Message Data"].json["from_number"]}}';

SELECT * FROM conversations
WHERE whatsapp_number = '{{$node["Prepare Message Data"].json["from_number"]}}';

UPDATE conversations
SET 
  title = '{{$node["Prepare Message Data"].json["message_text"]}}',
  current_step = 'description'
WHERE whatsapp_number = '{{$node["Prepare Message Data"].json["from_number"]}}';

SELECT * FROM conversations
WHERE whatsapp_number = '{{$node["Prepare Message Data"].json["from_number"]}}';

nodes.name: MySQL Read Current Step After Location

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO listings (
  whatsapp_number,
  category,
  title,
  description,
  contact_info,
  location,
  status
)
SELECT
  whatsapp_number,
  category,
  title,
  description,
  contact_info,
  location,
  'active'
FROM conversations
WHERE whatsapp_number = '{{$node["Prepare Message Data"].json["from_number"]}}'
  AND current_step = 'completed';

nodes.name: MySQL Set Step Start To Category
IF User Wants To Start Listing

parameters.query:
SELECT product_name, category, price, description, stock_status
FROM products
WHERE LOWER(product_name) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER('{{$node["Prepare Message Data"].json["message_text"]}}'), '%')
LIMIT 1;;

options.systemMessage:
=You are a friendly supermarket assistant.
Return a short, clear, friendly reply.
Use only the product data provided.
If no product is found, say:
Sorry, I could not find that product in the supermarket database.

parameters.query:
SELECT category, title, description, contact_info, location
FROM listings
WHERE LOWER(category) = LOWER('{{$node["Prepare Message Data"].json["message_text"]}}')
ORDER BY id DESC
LIMIT 5;

UPDATE conversations
SET 
  category = NULL,
  title = NULL,
  description = NULL,
  contact_info = NULL,
  location = NULL,
  current_step = 'start',
  status = 'active'
WHERE whatsapp_number = '{{$node["Prepare Message Data"].json["from_number"]}}';

SELECT * 
FROM listings
WHERE category = 'Products'
ORDER BY id DESC;
SELECT * FROM products;

UPDATE conversations
SET 
  category = NULL,
  title = NULL,
  description = NULL,
  contact_info = NULL,
  location = NULL,
  current_step = 'start',
  status = 'active'
WHERE whatsapp_number = '905338369108';
